issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, only happy path examples.

scenarios.name: Wire MikroORM into an Express app with per-request EntityManager
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses `MikroORM.init` with entities/dbName/type, wraps requests in `RequestContext.create(orm.em, next)`, mutates the entity directly and calls `em.flush()`; baseline manually constructs UPDATE queries instead of leveraging Unit-of-Work change tracking.

scenarios.name: Add soft-delete filter and top-author leaderboard QueryBuilder
scenarios.rationale: Treatment applies `@Filter({ name: 'active', cond: { deletedAt: null }, default: true })` plus `em.createQueryBuilder(User,'u').leftJoin('u.posts','p').groupBy('u.id').orderBy({post_count:'DESC'})`; baseline writes raw SQL and misses the @Filter automatic application.
